violations.text: Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

Walk-in cooler and grill cold drawers are not in good repair. These units are not currently being used and have been placed out of service. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026

Walk-in cooler, walk-in freezer, grill cold drawers, and dishwasher are in poor repair, not being used at this time. Equipment has been placed out of service. Refrigerated truck is currently being used to store cold foods. A 2-door reach-in has been ordered to increase refrigeration capacity. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Ambient temperature of grill cold hold drawers observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Cheese in this unit observed with a temperature of 45 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheese was in this unit for less than 2 hours and was moved to a properly functioning unit. No TCS foods are to be stored in cold drawers until they are serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Baked goods made in the food establishment are in the self-service area and are lacking labels. Food made in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

The walk-in cooler, walk-in freezer, grill cold drawers, and the dishwasher are not in good repair. None of this equipment is being used at this time. A refrigerated truck is being used to store cold foods. All equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

Muffins prepared in the food establishment are lacking labels and protective covering. Muffins are located in the self-service area. Food made/packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Muffins were relocated to behind the service line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Walk-in freezer and grill cold hold drawers are not in good repair as they are not holding required temperatures. No food products observed in these units at the time of this inspection. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2023
